SourceProxy.name: SHYXSelectionPlaneClipper
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Selection Plane Clipper

Documentation.short_help: Clip mesh with a plane from selection centroid and average normal.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Port 0 input is the full triangulated surface; port 0 output is the clipped mesh. Port 1 is a vtkSelection (same convention as SHYX Selection Extrude and VESPA Region Fairing): use Copy Active Selection in the Properties panel—no separate Extract Selection filter is required. The filter runs vtkExtractSelection internally, computes an area-weighted centroid and average face normal on the selected triangles, then clips the full mesh. With Tip connectivity (default), clipping follows the same strategy as SHYX Vessel End Clipper. Optional Selection Cell Array Name selects triangles on port 0 when no selection is provided. Fill Holes (default ON) runs vtkFillHolesFilter on the clip boundary using an automatic maximum hole size from the result bounds unless you set Fill Holes Maximum Size. Field data array SHYX_SelectionPlaneClipper_PlanePacked (six values: plane origin and direction handle) is attached to port 0 for the interactive plane widget and for scripting.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Active selection (cells or points on Input). Use Copy Active Selection in the panel.

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Selection Cell Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: If Selection is empty: name of a cell data array on Input. Triangles are selected when value is greater than 0.5 (float) or non-zero (integer types), same as SHYX Selection Extrude.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ClipOffset
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Clip Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Shift the plane origin along the averaged normal from the patch centroid.

IntVectorProperty.name: InvertPlane
IntVectorProperty.label: Invert Plane Normal
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Flip the averaged normal (and half-space labels) before clipping.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseTipConnectivity
IntVectorProperty.label: Tip Connectivity (Vessel End Clipper style)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), split the mesh by the plane and remove the smaller connected fragment near the selection centroid. When OFF, remove a single half-space controlled by Remove Positive Half-Space.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemovePositiveHalfSpace
IntVectorProperty.label: Remove Positive Half-Space
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Only when Tip Connectivity is OFF: if ON, delete the side where the plane implicit function is positive; if OFF, delete the negative side.

IntVectorProperty.name: FillHoles
IntVectorProperty.label: Fill Holes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), triangulate small open boundary loops after clipping (vtkFillHolesFilter), suitable for closing a planar cut. Turn OFF to keep the clip as an open surface.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FillHolesMaximumSize
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Fill Holes Maximum Size
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum boundary edge length considered for filling (vtkFillHolesFilter hole size). Zero (default) selects automatically from the clipped mesh bounding diagonal (about 35 percent).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseInteractiveCutPlanes
IntVectorProperty.label: Use Interactive Cut Plane
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled, a yellow plane widget overrides the automatic plane from the selection. Apply once so port 0 is generated (including the plane hint in field data), then drag the plane and Apply again to clip.

StringVectorProperty.name: InteractiveCutPacked
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Internal: six doubles (origin xyz, direction-handle xyz) for the implicit plane widget.
